get_current_time.name: get_current_time
get_current_time.description: Get the current date and time in a specific timezone. Returns an ISO 8601 formatted string with UTC offset (e.g. '2026-03-13T14:30:00+01:00'). Use IANA timezone names like 'Europe/Paris', 'America/New_York', 'UTC'.

parameters.name: timezone
parameters.description: IANA timezone identifier. Examples: 'Europe/Paris', 'America/New_York', 'Asia/Tokyo', 'UTC'. Defaults to 'UTC' if omitted.

get_system_info.name: get_system_info
get_system_info.description: Get current system resource usage: CPU percentage, RAM usage (used/total in GB), disk usage (used/total in GB), OS platform, and CPU core count. Useful for monitoring or answering questions about system performance.

ping_host.name: ping_host
ping_host.description: Test network connectivity to a host (IP address or domain name) using TCP. Returns success status and latency in milliseconds. Uses TCP ports 80/443/53 — does not require root privileges.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: IP address (e.g. '8.8.8.8') or domain name (e.g. 'google.com') to test.

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Maximum wait time per attempt in seconds. Default: 5.0.
